overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit city at night. The character follows pedestrians with glowing umbrellas along covered walkways and across wet streets, passing by holographic advertisements and futuristic vehicles.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk following a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing purple umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

traditional red lantern hanging from building facade
large red neon sign with dragon motif mounted on building

illuminated storefront signs and displays along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked covered sidewalk beneath a massive neon-lit cityscape. The overhead shelter provides partial cover from the heavy rain as the character follows a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella past various storefronts and red paper lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open rainy street exposed to weather
crossing the multi-lane street as vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street while navigating around slow-moving traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving slowly on the rain-soaked road

entered.detail: road sign displaying speed limit of 40
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
elevated highway ramp structure running parallel to the street
road intersection with traffic signals and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Leaving the sheltered walkway, the character enters the open street exposed to heavy rain. The scene opens up to reveal towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements. The character crosses the wet asphalt as a blue sports car drives past, with an elevated highway visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial boulevard with heavy rain

events.description: white sedan passes by on the wet road creating reflections

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge as multiple vehicles pass by on the rain-soaked asphalt

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving down the street with headlights reflecting off wet pavement

entered.detail: low concrete wall separating sidewalk from the elevated highway ramp
massive curved digital billboard displaying advertisements
yellow electrical utility box mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the multi-lane boulevard as heavy rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt. Vehicles including a white sedan pass by, their headlights cutting through the mist. The elevated highway ramp runs parallel on the left while massive digital billboards illuminate the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: marked pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes

events.description: crossing at marked crosswalk with other pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk alongside other pedestrians with illuminated umbrellas

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown coat with glowing yellow umbrella crossing the street
blue truck waiting at the intersection for pedestrians to cross

entered.detail: bold yellow striped markings indicating pedestrian crossing zone
major intersection with traffic controls and crossing signals

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a marked crosswalk with bold yellow stripes and begins crossing with a group of pedestrians carrying glowing umbrellas. A blue truck waits at the intersection as the rain continues to fall heavily, creating rippling reflections on the crosswalk surface.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, neon-lit sidewalk into the expansive, rain-drenched openness of a futuristic city boulevard. It begins beneath a covered walkway, trailing a pedestrian with a glowing umbrella past storefronts and red paper lanterns. As the character leaves the shelter, the scene opens up to a wide street exposed to heavy rain, revealing towering buildings draped in holographic advertisements and an elevated highway to the left. The camera then tracks along the multi-lane boulevard, where headlights from passing vehicles cut through the mist and reflect off deep pools of water on the asphalt. Finally, the movement leads the character toward a bold yellow crosswalk, joining a group of pedestrians with glowing umbrellas as a blue truck waits at the intersection amidst rippling reflections.
